## ✨ Editions

This GitHub download is now the **local-only, open-source edition** of Parley — fully on-device, bring your own AI providers, with **no account or cloud code** in the build. Nothing leaves your machine unless you wire up your own providers.

Want **sign-in, cross-device history sync, and shared team folders**? Grab the **cloud edition** from the Parley website.

## 🐛 Fixes

- Pasted text can no longer blow up the layout — long content in the context box is now height-capped and scrolls.
- API keys are never baked into the build: they live only in Settings (bring-your-own-key), so no key can be inlined into a release.

## macOS — how to open

This build is **ad-hoc signed** (not yet notarized with an Apple Developer ID). In-app auto-updates install cleanly and shouldn't trip a prompt. For a manual install, on first open macOS shows a security prompt:

- **Right-click (or Control-click) the app → Open → Open**, or
- **System Settings → Privacy & Security → Open Anyway** (after the first blocked attempt).

If a download still shows "damaged", clear the quarantine once:

```
xattr -cr /Applications/Parley.app
```
